first-contentful-paint.title: First Contentful Paint
first-contentful-paint.description: First Contentful Paint marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.

largest-contentful-paint.title: Largest Contentful Paint
largest-contentful-paint.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.

cumulative-layout-shift.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
cumulative-layout-shift.description: Cumulative Layout Shift measures the movement of visible elements within the viewport.

total-blocking-time.title: Total Blocking Time
total-blocking-time.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive, when task length exceeded 50ms.

speed-index.title: Speed Index
speed-index.description: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.

interactive.title: Time to Interactive
interactive.description: Time to Interactive is the amount of time it takes for the page to become fully interactive.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: This score is a weighted average of the performance metrics.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: SEO checks if the page is optimized for search engine results.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Accessibility checks if the page is optimized for users with disabilities.

best-practices.title: Best Practices
best-practices.description: Best practices checks if the page follows web development best practices.

pwa.title: PWA
pwa.description: PWA checks if the page meets the criteria for Progressive Web App.
